titlStmt.titl: MiCREATE - Migrant Children and Communities in a Transforming Europe. Interviews with Teachers at Viennese Schools (SUF edition)

citation.biblCit: Wolter, Stella; Liepold, Mira; Tatzber, Rosa; Sauer, Birgit, 2023, "MiCREATE - Migrant Children and Communities in a Transforming Europe. Interviews with Teachers at Viennese Schools (SUF edition)", https://doi.org/10.11587/VI5XKS, AUSSDA, V1

titlStmt.titl: MiCREATE - Migrant Children and Communities in a Transforming Europe. Interviews with Teachers at Viennese Schools (SUF edition)

distStmt.distrbtr: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

contact.affiliation: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

distStmt.depositr: Faculty of Social Sciences, University of Vienna

stdyInfo.abstract: Full edition for scientific use. The data was collected as part of the H2020 project "MiCREATE - Migrant Children and Communities in a Transforming Europe". It consists of transcripts of qualitative interviews and focus groups with school staff in selected Viennese schools. The aim of the research was to gain insights into integration measures in the Austrian school and education system and to provide policy recommendations for the local, national and EU level from a child-centered perspective, as well as to develop tools for schools to facilitate intercultural learning.

dataColl.collMode: Interview, Web-based interview, Focus group, Online focus group

dataAccs.notes: To access the files, users need to log in and click on "Request Access". AUSSDA will then contact you for more information.
AUSSDA Scientific Use Licence for data and CC BY for documentation

titlStmt.titl: Cakir, A., Wolter, S., Liepold, M., & Sauer, B. (2020). Intersectional contestations - The Meanings of Integration of 'Migrant' Pupils in Austrian Schools. Annales-Anali Za Istrske in Mediteranske Studije-Series Historia et Sociologia, 30(4), 587-600.

citation.biblCit: Cakir, A., Wolter, S., Liepold, M., & Sauer, B. (2020). Intersectional contestations - The Meanings of Integration of 'Migrant' Pupils in Austrian Schools. Annales-Anali Za Istrske in Mediteranske Studije-Series Historia et Sociologia, 30(4), 587-600.

otherMat.txt: Core data files - RTF format - Interview transcripts with 27 school staff members (10796_da01_de_v1_0.rtf - 10796_da27_de_v1_0.rtf) and 3 focus group transcripts with school staff members (10796_da28_de_v1_0.rtf, 10796_da29_de_v1_0.rtf, 10796_da30_de_v1_0.rtf)
